Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HMoniker
Description: Changes your display name. Local only: visible only to yourself outside of HMS (HMapSync) sessions.
Changelog: 1.3.0: names are now stored per character in their own file, so two game clients on separate accounts no longer share one list or overwrite each other. The settings window shows just the character you're logged in as (log in to another to edit its name), and the name fields wrap onto new lines as the window narrows. Existing names migrate automatically on first load.
